SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF HERLINDA AGUAYO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUSTICO CELIS ROBLEZA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS SANTOS ORELLANA GENERAL MANAGER FOR MV TRANSPORTATION. DEFENDANT MISSION BAY TRANSPORT ASSOCIATION INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WENDY SIVANI, MANAGER. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE ANY SERVICE OR PROOF OF SERVICES ISSUES PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS FOR CASES: 19-861954, 19-861955, 19-861956 ARE ALL RETAINED IN CASE CSM 19-861954. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.
